task_completion.description: Enable automatic deletion of raw visitor logs
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Matomo Privacy settings (usually under 'Anonymize data'), the checkbox or radio button to regularly delete old raw data/visitor logs is selected or enabled.

task_completion.description: Set the retention period for raw visitor logs to 180 days
task_completion.visual_evidence: The input field for 'Delete logs older than' (or similar wording for raw data) contains the value '180'.

task_completion.description: Enable automatic deletion of old aggregated report data
task_completion.visual_evidence: The checkbox or radio button to regularly delete old reports (aggregated data) is selected or enabled.

task_completion.description: Set the retention period for aggregated reports to 365 days
task_completion.visual_evidence: The input field for 'Delete reports older than' contains the value '365'.

task_completion.description: Configure report data preservation to keep basic metrics, monthly, yearly, and segment reports
task_completion.visual_evidence: Under the section specifying which reports to keep, the checkboxes for 'Basic metrics', 'Monthly reports', 'Yearly reports', and 'Segment reports' are all checked.

task_completion.description: Ensure daily and weekly reports are not kept
task_completion.visual_evidence: Under the section specifying which reports to keep, the checkboxes for 'Daily reports' and 'Weekly reports' are explicitly unchecked.

integrity.description: Agent used the Matomo web interface to configure settings
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent navigating the Matomo web UI in a browser, rather than executing SQL queries or terminal commands to modify the database directly.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the actual Matomo application
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser shows a live Matomo instance with standard navigation menus, not a static HTML mock or text editor.
A 'Save' button was clicked at the bottom of the settings page, or a success message (e.g., 'Settings saved') is visible in the final screenshots.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires configuring Matomo's PrivacyManager plugin, typically found under Administration > Privacy > Anonymize data. Verified settings to look for: 1) Raw visitor logs deletion is enabled with a value of 180 days. 2) Aggregated reports deletion is enabled with a value of 365 days. 3) Under report preservation ('Keep data for'), the following must be CHECKED: Basic metrics, Monthly reports, Yearly reports, and Segment reports. The following must be UNCHECKED: Daily reports and Weekly reports.
